data.title: Off The Hook YS to acquire Bellhart Marine
data.description:
• Off The Hook YS (OTH) said on Thursday that it will acquire Bellhart Marine Group.
  • This includes its affiliated entities Bellhart Marine Services, Specialized Mechanical Services, and Specialized Mechanical Services.
  • OTH +0.82% premarket to $2.45.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Asante Gold Corporation GAAP EPS of -$0.55, revenue of $482.59M
data.description:
• Asante Gold Corporation press release (ASE:CA): FY GAAP EPS of -$0.55.
  • Revenue of $482.59M.
  • As at December 31, 2025, the Company had cash on hand of $44.0M.

data.title: U.S. international trade in goods deficit widens modestly in February
data.description:
February International Trade in Goods (Advance) balance came in at -$84.6B, compared with the -$81.8B shortfall in January (revised from -$80.8B), according to data released by the Census Bureau on Thursday.

The February rise in the goods and services deficit reflected an increase in the goods deficit of $2.5B to $84.6B and a decrease in the services surplus of $0.2B to $27.3B.

February exports were $314.8B, $12.6 billion more than January exports. February imports were$372.1B, $15.2B more than January imports.

The deficit advanced $0.4B to $61.6B for the three months ending in February, the Census Bureau said.

Year-to-date, the deficit decreased $136.1B, or 54.8%, from the same period in 2025.

data.title: Xvivo Perfusion AB (publ) GAAP EPS of SEK 0.80, revenue of SEK 812.2M
data.description:
• Xvivo Perfusion AB (publ) press release (XVIPF): FY GAAP EPS of SEK 0.80.
  • Revenue of SEK 812.2M (-1.2% Y/Y).

data.title: Initial jobless claims unexpectedly fall in past week
data.description:
Initial jobless claims for the week ended March 28: -9K to 202K vs. 213K consensus and 211K (revised from 210K) prior, according to data released by the U.S. Department of Labor on Thursday.

The four-week moving average was 207.75K, compared to the prior week's average of 210.75K (revised from 210.50K).

Continuing claims: 1.841M vs. 1.840M consensus and 1.816M (revised from 1.819M) prior.

Developing… Check back for updates.

data.title: BAE Systems secures $180M contract from Sweden
data.description:
•  BAE Systems (BAESY) has secured a contract worth $180M from the Swedish Defence Materiel Administration (FMV) for the TRIDON Mk2 anti-aircraft system.
  • The TRIDON Mk2 is a truck-mounted 40 mm anti-aircraft gun system that addresses a gap in today's air defense. The system has multi-target capability and can engage a wide range of aerial threats, including drones, cruise missiles, and aircraft. Additionally, it can target ground threats such as armored vehicles, providing protection and security for both military forces and civil infrastructure, the company said. 
  • In February, on behalf of Sweden and Denmark, the FMV procured TRIDON Mk2 systems to donate to Ukraine as part of a package to bolster Ukraine's air defense capabilities.
  • BAESY -1.88% premarket to $120.36.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Cheer announces 1-for-3 share consolidation
data.description:
• Cheer (CHR) will implement a 1-for-3 share consolidation effective April 6, 2026, to combine every three shares into one.
  • The consolidation will reduce outstanding Class A shares from about 4.69M to roughly 1.56M.
  • Share capital structure will be adjusted, including increasing Class A par value from $0.05 to $0.15 per share.
  • The move is primarily aimed at boosting the share price to maintain Nasdaq listing compliance.

data.title: RTX shares rise on Melius upgrade amid defense demand
data.description:
Shares of RTX (RTX) rose about 1.6% in premarket trading Thursday after Melius Research upgraded the stock to a Buy rating from Hold.

Analyst Scott Mikus pointed to surging demand tied to the ongoing conflict with Iran, highlighting the need to replenish a wide range of military equipment, including missiles, interceptors, radar systems and aircraft damaged or expended in the fighting.

The call reflects a broader trend across the defense sector, where sustained combat activity is driving increased demand for munitions and related systems, pressuring inventories and boosting the outlook for major contractors.

data.title: AAON appoints new CFO
data.description:
• Andy Cheung will join AAON (AAON) as executive VP & chief financial officer on April 20, 2026.
  • Cheung previously served as CFO of Commercial Vehicle Group.
  • Current CFO Rebecca Thompson will transition to chief accounting officer.
